svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;
svg.content:
<mxfile host="Electron"> <diagram name="mission-fsm" id="0"> <mxGraphModel dx="-458" dy="-201" grid="0" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="0" page="0" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=18;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#333333;" value="任务层有限状态机（五态）：搜索 → 对齐 → 跟踪，含失锁重捕与应急上浮" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="800" x="20" y="16" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="10" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#dae8fc;strokeColor=#6c8ebf;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1f3a5f;" value="SEARCH_ZIGZAG
搜索之字形扫描 · 全速" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="200" x="230" y="70" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="11" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#274d20;" value="LOCK_ALIGN
对齐锁定 · 减速" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="200" x="230" y="230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="12" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#274d20;" value="TRACK_ACTIVE
声磁协同跟踪 · 全速" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="200" x="230" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="13" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;strokeColor=#d6b656;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#6b5610;" value="REACQUIRE_REGION
有界区内重捕 · 中速" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="200" x="580" y="390" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="14" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f8cecc;strokeColor=#b85450;fontSize=13;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#7a2e2a;strokeWidth=2;" value="EMERGENCY_SURFACE
应急上浮（终态·不可逆）· 速度归零" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="66" width="220" x="220" y="560" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="100" edge="1" parent="1" source="10" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" target="11" value="信号迟滞锁存·连续达标"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="101" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.7;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.7;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" target="10" value="信号丢失"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="102" edge="1" parent="1" source="11" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.3;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.3;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" target="12" value="拟合收敛（PCA+偏航+置信度）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="103" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.7;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.7;entryY=1;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#d79b00;strokeWidth=2;fontSize=11;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#9c6a00;" target="11" value="信号丢失·保留中心线（不对称回退）"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="104" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0.5;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" target="13" value="需重捕·重捕区就绪"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="105" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=11;fontColor=#333333;" target="11" value="信号恢复·不再需重捕"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="680" y="263" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="106" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=1;exitY=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#999999;fontSize=11;fontColor=#666666;" target="10" value="重捕区不可用 / 超时"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="840" y="103" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="107" edge="1" parent="1" source="12" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontColor=#9c3a36;" target="14" value="置信度持续跌破地板"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="108" edge="1" parent="1" source="13" style="edgeStyle=orthogonalEdgeStyle;rounded=1;orthogonalLoop=1;jettySize=auto;html=1;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;entryX=1;entryY=0.5;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;strokeColor=#b85450;strokeWidth=1.5;fontSize=11;fontColor=#9c3a36;" target="14" value="置信度持续跌破地板"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points"> <mxPoint x="680" y="593" /> </Array> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="200" parent="1" style="text;html=1;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;fontSize=12;fontStyle=0;fontColor=#666666;spacingLeft=8;" value="图注：本图按代码现状绘制为五态。其中 REACQUIRE_REGION（有界重捕）为当前实现新增态，docs/03《任务状态机方法论》仍记述为「三态 + 应急终态」，待同步更新。橙色加粗边为关键不对称回退：TRACK→LOCK 在信号丢失时仍保留已拟合中心线，区别于 LOCK→SEARCH 的完全重搜。" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="56" width="820" x="20" y="650" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root> </mxGraphModel> </diagram> </mxfile>

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 1px; height: 1px; padding-top: 15px; margin-left: 400px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #333333;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#333333, #c1c1c1); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: 任务层有限状态机（五态）：搜索 → 对齐 → 跟踪，含失锁重捕与应急上浮

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.div: 图注：本图按代码现状绘制为五态。其中 REACQUIRE_REGION（有界重捕）为当前实现新增态，docs/03《任务状态机方法论》仍记述为「三态 + 应急终态」，待同步更新。橙色加粗边为关键不对称回退：TRACK→LOCK 在信号丢失时仍保留已拟合中心线，区别于 LOCK→SEARCH 的完全重搜。

a.text: Text is not SVG - cannot display
